name: JSON Feed Specification
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Introduction"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This document presents the product feed specification for the\u00a0"}, {"text": "JSON", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0feeds to be sent to Maropost Marketing Cloud (formerly Findify)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order for the product feed to be synchronized periodically with the search engine, the JSON file must be accessible via HTTP or HTTPS. Merchandising Cloud is supporting files behind basic authentication."}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Mandatory Fields"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following table presents the mandatory fields you will need to insert in the product feed."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name of the field"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "id"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Unique identifier of the product. This identifier must be\u00a0"}, {"text": "unique", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0across all products."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "tddy123uk", "italic": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "item_group_id"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Common identifier for all variants of the same product. If there are no variants present for the product, use the same value as\u00a0"}, {"text": "id", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "89A", "italic": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "title"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Title of the product."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Men's Pique Polo Shirt", "italic": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description of the product."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Solid red, king-sized bed sheets made from 100% woven polyester 300-thread count fabric. Set includes one fitted sheet, one flat sheet and two standard pillowcases. Machine washable; extra-deep fitted pockets.", "italic": true}]}]}], "actualHeight": 227.9375}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "price"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Price of the product."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "15.99", "italic": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "image_url"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "URL of the product image. Fields"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom fields that are not part of the model above but can be specified in the feed. Custom fields can contain a large panel of information, specific to your products or to your business. Custom fields can be configured to be used as a searchable field or as a filter in the Merchandising Cloud Merchant Dashboard."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "At the moment, only the custom fields that have a type\u00a0"}, {"text": "String", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0or\u00a0"}, {"text": "Double", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0are accepted."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To include custom fields, add a new field whose name is your custom field name.\nHere is an example where the custom fields gender and occasion have been added to the product mandatory and optional fields."}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "json", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"tddy123uk\","}]}, {"type": "\"title\": \"Men's long sleeves white shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"description\": \"This product has long sleeve, comfortable fabric, button front closure and a solid color\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"price\": 69,"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"image_url\": \"http://www.example.com/my_image.jpg\","}]}, {"type": {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"thumbnail_url\": \"http://www.example.com/my_image_small.jpg\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"availability\": \"in stock\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"created_at\": \"2014-04-22T06:00:00Z\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"brand\": \"Calvin Klein\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"material\": \"60% Cotton, 40% Polyester\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"color\": \"white\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"size\": \"L\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"quantity\": 30,"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"gender\": \"Man\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"occasion\": \"wedding\""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "}"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Variants"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your feed contains variants, by default, Merchandising Cloud will group them into one unique product. By specifying the field \u201citem_group_id\u201d and filling it with a common value for the variants you want to group, we will group these variants into 1 product."}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "json", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"610010\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Men's long sleeves white shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"price\": 54,"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"size\": \"L\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "... \"item_group_id\": \"630446\""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "} {"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"610011\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Men's long sleeves white shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"price\": 60,"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"size\": \"XL\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "...,"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"item_group_id\": \"630446\""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "}"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here the same T-shirt available in both sizes L and XL will be grouped into 1 unique product."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your model does not permit it, grouping the variants according to the product URL or another field from the set of mandatory fields is also possible. Let us know if it is the case!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Structure of the product feed"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We are accepting different structures for the JSON feed. You can choose the one you prefer depending on the complexity on your side to generate the feed."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "1 product per line (JSONL format)"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "json", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"15363\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Long sleeve shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "..."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "} {"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"73829\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Short sleeve shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "..."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "}"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "1 array containing all the products"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "json", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[{"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"15363\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Long sleeve shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "..."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "},"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"73829\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Short sleeve shirt\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "..."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "}]"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Remove some products from appearing in the search"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sometimes, you would like to remove some products from the search. This can be useful when the feed is automatically generated or if you have wholesale products you do not wish to make them appear in the search results. In order to remove these products, you need to add another field named \u201ctags\u201d and give it the value\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-remove", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "json", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"id\": \"637382\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"title\": \"Long sleeve shirt for kid\","}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "... \"tags\": \"findify-remove\""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "}"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In case you have already tags in your feed, separate the value \u201cfindify-remove\" from the other values with a comma: \u201cfindify-remove, tag1, tag2\u201d."}]}]
